title: notifications core — OpenTelemetry metrics
description: Core-owned metrics. Per-channel provider metrics (latency, cost per message, provider error rates) live in the respective channel module's metrics.json. Core measures the funnel + digest queue + preference resolution + template registry health.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.dispatch.total
metrics.description: Every Notifications::dispatch() call. The top of the funnel.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.dispatch.duration_ms
metrics.description: Time from dispatch call to SendNotificationJob queued. Cheap synchronous work; should stay < 100ms P95.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.dispatch.suppressed_total
metrics.description: Suppression by preference / quiet-hours / digest-batch / kill-switch. reason: 'preference_opt_out' | 'quiet_hours' | 'digest_batched' | 'kill_switch' | 'tenant_suspended' | 'age_gate_blocked'.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.deliveries.by_state_total
metrics.description: state: queued/sending/sent/delivered/opened/clicked/failed. Combined with duration_ms gives the funnel.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.delivery.duration_ms
metrics.description: Time from state=queued to terminal state (delivered / failed). outcome: 'delivered' | 'failed'.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.delivery.retries_total
metrics.description: Retry attempts per delivery. Correlates with provider health.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.template.render.duration_ms
metrics.description: Blade rendering time of pre-rendered HTML with variables. Should stay < 25ms P99 — the React Email work happened at build time.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.template.render.errors_total
metrics.description: Render failures (missing variable, invalid Blade syntax, missing template).

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.digest.queue_depth
metrics.description: Number of digests awaiting delivery. Sampled every 30s. Anomalously high indicates ProcessDigestJob stalled.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.digest.batch_size
metrics.description: Number of notifications in each delivered digest.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.preferences.cache.hits_total
metrics.description: Preference cache hits — for hit-ratio derivation.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.preferences.cache.misses_total
metrics.description: Preference cache misses — for hit-ratio derivation.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.preferences.updates_total
metrics.description: Preference changes. source: 'user_settings' | 'unsubscribe_link' | 'admin_override' | 'seed'. Enabled: '0'|'1' — tracks opt-in vs opt-out flow.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.categories.registered
metrics.description: Count of registered categories. Should equal sum of every module's notifications.json + tenant-override rows. Anomaly = registry bug.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.templates.published
metrics.description: Count of published templates per channel. Growth tracks tenant customization adoption.

metrics.name: academorix.notifications.unsubscribes_total
metrics.description: source: 'one_click' | 'settings_page'. Marketing category unsubscribes are the primary compliance signal.
